name: Arshauni
startIntroPart1: Queen Catherine of the Crims Dynasty. Born during the turbulent Conquest era of the world, you took the throne at an early age. Accompanied by your three brothers you reformed the governance of what was once a backward tribe into an efficient feudal monarchy, taking inspiration from the Valricans but with your own twist of centralized power and stronger authority of the crown. Oh, Catherine. Your people call for your guidance and leadership. Can you take the throne and lead your people into greatness? Can you reform your nation into a great cultural hub that will be remembered for years to come? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: This conquest will bring us glory as we turn you into history!
attacked: This transgression will not be forgotten!
defeated: No... This is not right... We were supposed to win...
introduction: You stand before the Queen of the Arshauni, I hope you are to be our friend.
neutralHello: I greet you with open arms.
hateHello: Relations can be fixed, use your words carefully.
tradeRequest: Let us exchange wealth and goods for the goodness of both of our nations.
uniques: Comment [Unique Unit is a Great General military unit that scales by the land melee unit techs alongside having a stronger effect.]

name: Redinma
startIntroPart1: Aureli Cestanus, King of Redinma. Originating from the line of the last few Valrican Emperors, your claim on the imperial throne is strong, yet contested. You stabilized the lands near the old capital and took full control of the peninsula that once was the capital of wealth in the world. Eventually, you began to march northwards to continue your attempts at reunifying the shattered nations of what was once the Valrican Empire. Oh, Aureli. The glory of the past calls to be reborn. Can you resurrect the ancient empire? Can you hold onto and control the disorganized realms of old? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Consider this a reconquering of what should be mine!
attacked: You wield your sword like a noble, yet your actions is of a barbarian!
defeated: My empire! You will pay for what you've done!
introduction: Bow before who will soon be your emperor.
hateHello: Words can not express the humility you bring to your people.
tradeRequest: I am willing to share my prosperity with you if you are willing to accept.
uniques: [+1 Happiness] <for [9999] turns> <upon conquering a city> <hidden from users>
Comment [Capturing a city will grant you a permanent +1 Happiness that never decays.]
